weaknesses.location: Results 'Reciprocity, clustering, and three-node motifs' subsection
weaknesses.issue: Long single paragraph mixing reciprocity stats, motif frequencies, and small-worldness; reader has to track too many disparate findings at once.
weaknesses.fix: Split into clearer paragraphs by topic (reciprocity stats, neurotransmitter composition of reciprocal pairs, three-node motifs, small-worldness) with topic sentences.

weaknesses.issue: Misses the formal definitions of connection probability p and reciprocity from the experimental log (equations were in the source).
weaknesses.fix: Add explicit equation-form definitions of connection probability, reciprocity, and clustering.

weaknesses.issue: The row combining average path lengths via \multicolumn is visually awkward inside a numeric table.
weaknesses.fix: Move path-length comparison out of the table into text or a note; keep the table focused on probability/reciprocity/clustering.

weaknesses.issue: Mentions 32 million synapses at threshold 5 in the abstract-level but not in main text; also the Pearson R claim is framed as 'weakly correlated' while R=0.76 is moderate.
weaknesses.fix: Add the 32 million synapses number into the results narrative, and reword Pearson correlation sentence to match the experimental log phrasing.
